title: [codereview2] Kconfig help text and dependencies incomplete per spec mugl.1
description: Help text should reference spec/08-gateway-coordination.md (even if merged), mention both federation modes explicitly, add prompt text for mode. Depends on LICHEN_COAP_SERVER or the modular one. Tag: codereview
close_reason: Kconfig now uses choice with prompt, explicit help referencing mugl.3 and both modes, proper depends on COAP_SERVER/CONFIG. 3/3 codereview passes clean for this chunk.
